title: Task 4: 集成到捕获流程 (AC: 1, 2, 3)
summary: The implementation correctly integrates window filtering into the capture flow, satisfying all three acceptance criteria (AC1, AC2, AC3). The code is well-structured with good test coverage for the new functionality. The window filtering is applied before expensive operations (screenshot, AI analysis), which is an efficient design. The use of skip_serializing_if for backward compatibility and the graceful degradation in parse_window_patterns show attention to robustness.

issues.description: auto_perception module tests are gated behind 'screenshot' feature, not run in CI
issues.recommendation: Consider adding a CI job that runs tests with screenshot feature on a platform that supports it, or move parse_window_patterns and CaptureSettings tests to a module that's always compiled

issues.description: Pre-existing test failure in memory_storage::tests::finds_record_saved_near_local_midnight unrelated to SMART-001
issues.recommendation: Fix timezone test separately as part of technical debt cleanup

strengths: Correct implementation of all three ACs with clear code-to-requirement traceability
Efficient design: window filtering applied before screenshot/AI analysis
Good test coverage: 12 new tests for parse_window_patterns, ScreenAnalysis, and CaptureSettings
Backward compatibility via skip_serializing_if on active_window field
Graceful degradation in parse_window_patterns (returns empty Vec on parse failure)
Clear code comments linking implementation to specific ACs
Follows project conventions: snake_case, Chinese error messages, params![] for SQL
